name: wan-huiyan-dbt-model-planner
description: Plan and build dbt models from schema requirements through structured planning with human review, schema validation, and multi-dialect SQL generation

plugins.name: dbt-model-planner
plugins.description: Full lifecycle dbt model planner: requirements → source mapping → planning spreadsheet with human review → schema validation → SQL model creation → verification. Multi-dialect support (Spark, Snowflake, BigQuery, Postgres).
